title: ZXPong Overview
description: Discover ZXPong, the retro-inspired arcade game featuring Solo Play, World PVP, achievements, leaderboards, BarkinMad Coins, and unlockable paddle skins.
summary: ZXPong combines classic paddle-and-ball gameplay with modern online competition, progression, and rewards.

images.caption: Fast-paced arcade gameplay with every rally.

sections.heading: Welcome to ZXPong
paragraphs: ZXPong is a retro-inspired arcade game and part of the ZX Series from BarkinMad Studios.

Master quick reactions, build longer rallies, challenge AI opponents, compete against players around the world, unlock achievements, earn BarkinMad Coins, and personalise your game with unlockable paddle skins.

sections.heading: Getting Started
paragraphs: Begin with the How to Play guide before exploring Controls, Game Modes, and Tips & Strategy.
Once you're comfortable with the gameplay, continue with BarkinMad Coins, Achievements, and Leaderboards to discover everything ZXPong has to offer.

sections.heading: Available Today
paragraphs: ZXPong is available now on the App Store.
Solo Play and World PVP provide fast-paced arcade action, with additional features and content planned for future updates.

featureShowcases.heading: Everything You Need to Get Started
featureShowcases.summary: Discover what makes ZXPong exciting and where to learn more about every part of the game.
body: ZXPong combines the classic arcade gameplay that made Pong famous with modern features including online multiplayer, achievements, leaderboards, and BarkinMad Coins.
This guide introduces the game, explains the core mechanics, and helps you discover every feature as your skills improve.
bullets: Discover Solo Play and World PVP.
Explore achievements, leaderboards, and BarkinMad Coins.

image.caption: Everything begins with your first rally.

featureShowcases.heading: Keep Improving
featureShowcases.summary: Every match helps you unlock achievements, climb the leaderboards, and earn BarkinMad Coins.
body: As your skills improve, you'll unlock achievements, build longer rallies, earn BarkinMad Coins, and compete for better leaderboard positions.
Whether you're playing Solo or World PVP, every match helps you become a stronger player.

image.caption: Every match is another opportunity to improve.
